final:
module top_module(
  input [11:0] address,
  input clock,
  input [15:0] data,
  input wren,
  output reg [15:0] q
);reg [15:0] memory [0:4095];

  always @(posedge clock) begin
  if (wren) begin memory[address] <= data ; end
  end

  always @(posedge clock) begin
  q <= memory[address] ;
  end

endmodule
